Title: dots.tts Technical Report
Author: Shi Lian, Changtao Li, Bohan Li, Hankun Wang, Da Zheng, Junfeng Tian, Yufeng Ma, Colin Zhang, Kai Yu
Description: dots.tts is a 2B-parameter continuous autoregressive TTS foundation model that models speech in a continuous latent space, combining an AudioVAE trained with multiple objectives, full-history conditioning in a flow-matching head for long-range consistency, and reward-free self-corrective post-training. Trained on a large multilingual corpus, it supports zero-shot voice cloning and achieves the best average performance on Seed-TTS-Eval.
